message:
Add CI workflow and pre-commit hook for dist rebuild

GitHub Action runs build, verifies dist is up to date, and runs
tests on push/PR to main. Pre-commit hook auto-rebuilds dist/
when server/src/ files are staged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+name: CI
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  build-and-test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 22
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: server/package-lock.json
+
+      - run: npm ci
+        working-directory: server
+
+      - run: npm run build
+        working-directory: server
+
+      - name: Verify dist is up to date
+        run: git diff --exit-code server/dist/
+
+      - run: npm test
+        working-directory: server
